posts.author: estoppi (Ethan Stoppi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We receive numerous questions that are similar from clients through email even with a FAQ page on our website.

What are you trying to achieve

We would like to request an option in the Monday.com email message window for us to select an AI to write a response to a client email that we can then edit if needed.
